content.markdownBody:
## 📄 Arxiv 前沿论文

> **爬取时间**：2026-05-29 07:27:27 UTC

本表数据来自 Arxiv 检索，关键词组为 `(uav|aerial) & (vlm|llm|mllm) & (rl|reinforcement learning)`，时间窗口 2026-01-29 ~ 2026-02-04。

| 评分 | 标题 | 说明 | 链接 | 标签 | 发表时间 | 学科类别 |
|------|------|------|------|------|----------|----------|
| 9 | APEX: A Decoupled Memory-based Explorer for Asynchronous Aerial Object Goal Navigation | 提出面向无人机目标导航的异步记忆探索器，解决具身AI中空中目标定位难题 | http://arxiv.org/abs/2602.00551v1 | UAV,目标导航,具身AI,强化学习,内存机制 | 2026-01-31 | cs.RO |
| 8 | RGBX-R1: Visual Modality Chain-of-Thought Guided Reinforcement Learning for Multimodal Grounding | 提出多模态思维链引导的强化学习方法，提升视觉语言模型在非RGB模态下的定位能力 | http://arxiv.org/abs/2602.00504v1 | 多模态大模型,视觉定位,思维链,强化学习,RGBX | 2026-01-31 | cs.CV |

本周该关键词组合在 Semantic Scholar 未检索到相关论文。

## 📚 OpenAlex

本表数据来自 OpenAlex 检索，关键词组为 `(uav|aerial) & (vlm|llm|mllm) & (rl)`，时间窗口 2026-01-29 ~ 2026-02-04。

| 评分 | 标题 | 说明 | 链接 | 标签 | 发表时间 | 来源/venue | 引用数 |
|------|------|------|------|------|----------|------------|--------|
| 9 | A Survey on Evaluation of Embodied AI | 综述多模态大模型与视觉语言动作模型的具身AI评测方法 | https://doi.org/10.22541/au.177023340.02874343/v1 | 具身AI,评测,多模态大模型,综述 | 2026-02-04 | - | 1 |
| 8 | RSGround-Rethinking Remote Sensing Visual Grounding through Spatial Reasoning | 重新思考遥感视觉定位的空间推理方法 | https://openalex.org/W7126282066 | 遥感,视觉定位,空间推理,无人机 | 2026-01-29 | ArXiv.org | 0 |
| 8 | Toward Cognitive Supersensing in Multimodal Large Language Model | 探索多模态大模型的认知超感知能力 | https://openalex.org/W7127542677 | 多模态大模型,认知感知,超感知 | 2026-02-02 | ArXiv.org | 0 |
| 8 | AIR-VLA: Vision-Language-Action Systems for Aerial Manipulation | 提出面向空中操作的视觉语言动作系统 | https://openalex.org/W7126281959 | 空中机器人,视觉语言动作,无人机操作 | 2026-01-29 | arXiv (Cornell University) | 0 |
| 7 | LLM-Powered Obstacle Map Generation for UAV Path Planning in Complex Weather Conditions | 利用大语言模型生成复杂天气下的无人机路径规划障碍图 | https://doi.org/10.1007/s11265-026-01983-0 | 无人机,路径规划,大语言模型,气象 | 2026-01-29 | Journal of Signal Processing Systems | 0 |
| 7 | Self-evolving Embodied AI | 探讨具身AI的自演进机制 | https://openalex.org/W7128096045 | 具身AI,自演进,强化学习 | 2026-02-04 | ArXiv.org | 0 |
| 7 | Large Language Model Aided Integrated Sensing and Communication for Low-Altitude Economy | 大模型辅助的低空经济集成感知通信 | https://openalex.org/W7128128129 | 低空经济,集成感知通信,大语言模型 | 2026-02-02 | Open Access at Essex | 0 |
| 7 | ThreatSense: Neuro-Symbolic Reasoning for Autonomous Threat Assessment in Unmanned Systems | 神经符号推理用于无人系统自主威胁评估 | https://doi.org/10.71465/mrcis215 | 无人系统,威胁评估,神经符号推理 | 2026-01-31 | Multidisciplinary Research in Computing Information Systems | 0 |
| 6 | Interpretable group gated priority traces for scalarized multi-objective reinforcement learning in autonomous drone operations | 可解释的多目标强化学习优先轨迹用于无人机操作 | https://doi.org/10.3389/fbuil.2026.1747709 | 无人机,多目标强化学习,可解释AI | 2026-02-04 | Frontiers in Built Environment | 0 |
| 6 | Learning unknown reward function for drone navigation based on inverse deep reinforcement learning | 基于逆深度强化学习的未知奖励函数学习 | https://doi.org/10.1007/s00521-025-11698-1 | 无人机,逆强化学习,导航 | 2026-02-01 | Neural Computing and Applications | 0 |
| 6 | Heterogeneous Vertiport Selection Optimization for On-Demand Air Taxi Services | 深度强化学习优化异构垂直起降点选择 | https://openalex.org/W7126282159 | 城市空中交通,强化学习,优化 | 2026-01-29 | ArXiv.org | 0 |
| 5 | Task-free Adaptive Meta Black-box Optimization | 无任务自适应元黑盒优化 | https://openalex.org/W7126281934 | 元学习,黑盒优化,强化学习 | 2026-01-29 | ArXiv.org | 0 |
| 5 | Agentic AI Security in 6G Networks | 6G网络中代理AI安全综述 | https://doi.org/10.36227/techrxiv.176972133.38919604/v1 | 6G,AI安全,代理系统 | 2026-01-29 | - | 0 |
| 5 | Is Collaboration Worth It? A Decision-Oriented Survey in Multi-Agent Systems | 多智能体系统协作决策综述 | https://doi.org/10.36227/techrxiv.176978654.41579706/v1 | 多智能体,协作,决策 | 2026-01-30 | - | 0 |
| 5 | Scaling Down with Small Language Models | 小语言模型的视觉、应用与挑战 | https://doi.org/10.36227/techrxiv.177004226.60393974/v1 | 小语言模型,视觉模型,效率 | 2026-02-02 | - | 0 |

| 评分 | 标题 | 说明 | 链接 | 标签 | Star | Fork | 主语言 |

| 7 | ruvnet/RuView | 利用WiFi信号实现实时空间智能与生命体征监测 | https://github.com/ruvnet/RuView | WiFi感知,空间智能,生命体征 | - | - | - |
| 7 | microsoft/agent-governance-toolkit | AI代理治理工具包，涵盖策略执行与零信任身份 | https://github.com/microsoft/agent-governance-toolkit | AI治理,代理安全,OWASP | - | - | - |
| 6 | anthropics/knowledge-work-plugins | 为知识工作者设计的Claude插件集合 | https://github.com/anthropics/knowledge-work-plugins | Claude,插件,知识工作 | - | - | - |
| 6 | hardikpandya/stop-slop | 移除AI写作特征的技能文件 | https://github.com/hardikpandya/stop-slop | AI写作,文本优化,技能 | - | - | - |
| 6 | mukul975/Anthropic-Cybersecurity-Skills | 754个结构化网络安全技能库，映射5大框架 | https://github.com/mukul975/Anthropic-Cybersecurity-Skills | 网络安全,AI代理,MITRE | - | - | - |

## 🔎 GitHub 指定日期检索

本表数据来自 GitHub 官方 `search/repositories` 在全站公开仓库范围内的检索结果，关键词为 `uav & (rl|llm)`，附加 `pushed` 日期条件，**不是** Trending 周榜。

| 评分 | 标题 | 说明 | 链接 | 标签 | Star | Fork | 主语言 |
|------|------|------|------|------|------|------|--------|
| 9 | GongXudong/awesome-RL-for-UAVs | 无人机强化学习应用精选资源列表 | https://github.com/GongXudong/awesome-RL-for-UAVs | 无人机,强化学习,资源列表 | 56 | 1 | - |
| 8 | KashifKhaan/UAV-MovingPlatformLanding-DjiTello | 基于计算机视觉的无人机自主降落移动平台 | https://github.com/KashifKhaan/UAV-MovingPlatformLanding-DjiTello | 无人机,自主降落,计算机视觉 | 25 | 3 | Python |
| 7 | yblei/CloudTrack | 基于自然语言描述的视频目标追踪 | https://github.com/yblei/CloudTrack | 视频追踪,语言描述,目标定位 | 19 | 1 | Python |
| 7 | ThunderFly-aerospace/TFSLOT01 | 无人机低速空速传感器 | https://github.com/ThunderFly-aerospace/TFSLOT01 | 无人机,空速传感器,硬件 | 17 | 3 | G-code |
| 6 | bildadnz/UAV-Wireless-Communication | 层级深度强化学习的多无人机无线供能通信 | https://github.com/bildadnz/UAV-Wireless-Communication | 无人机,无线通信,深度强化学习 | 10 | 2 | Python |
| 6 | JackyLi-HKUST/awesome-uav-usv-landing | 无人机在舰船上的降落研究资源列表 | https://github.com/JackyLi-HKUST/awesome-uav-usv-landing | 无人机,舰船降落,感知控制 | 9 | 1 | - |
| 6 | HyunLee8/auto-uav | 基于DJI Tellopy的自主人脸追踪无人机 | https://github.com/HyunLee8/auto-uav | 人脸追踪,无人机,LLM通信 | 8 | 1 | Python |
| 6 | Dhruv15112004/Robust-SEE-UAV-RIS-DRL | 基于DRL的鲁棒保密能效无人机RIS通信 | https://github.com/Dhruv15112004/Robust-SEE-UAV-RIS-DRL | 无人机,RIS,保密通信,DRL | 8 | 1 | Python |
| 5 | alexv565/px4-rl-project | PX4强化学习与迁移学习无人机管道 | https://github.com/alexv565/px4-rl-project | PX4,强化学习,迁移学习 | 2 | 0 | Python |
| 5 | 3462994500/Research-on-UAV-base-station-coverage-optimization-based-on-MADRL-2 | 基于多智能体深度强化学习的无人机基站覆盖优化 | https://github.com/3462994500/Research-on-UAV-base-station-coverage-optimization-based-on-MADRL-2 | 无人机基站,多智能体强化学习,覆盖优化 | 2 | 0 | Python |
| 5 | m-fahad-nasir/VLM_Weed_Framework | 基于视觉语言模型的无人机精准农业杂草检测 | https://github.com/m-fahad-nasir/VLM_Weed_Framework | 视觉语言模型,杂草检测,精准农业 | 1 | 2 | Jupyter Notebook |
| 5 | Eunsung-kespion/UAV_recovery_RL | 深度强化学习用于无人机轨迹预测与机械臂回收 | https://github.com/Eunsung-kespion/UAV_recovery_RL | 深度强化学习,轨迹预测,ROS | 1 | 0 | CMake |
